title: The Marines Watch the Chaos
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the marines watch the chaos, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and bring it all the way to the top.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A splendid idea, that it is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you do that, and then you grab the chain and fall....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That sort of crazy idea will never...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You should also quickly join us, Kanoichi, that you should!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Run away!!! This guy's Dan- GEROUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: And yup- there's actually nothing coming out of the gun on his head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Senior, you've got to run!! Use your ability to head under- ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: This is no time to be brushing your teeth with a shoe polish brush.:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Why didn't you use your ability to dodge!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: My "sui Sui no m!" may let me swim freely through walls and floors....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: It's not for running away from the enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: ...I only swim when I wanna swim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Ah, he's all covered in blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: And even though he's definitely got broken bones, too, he's disin-fecting it all with some brandy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: That's not it at all!! Senor, you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: You were even prepared to die!! The reason you took that attack head-on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Is Be- Cause, Behind You... Was a friend....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: NOOO!! Senor <3 you're breaking our hearts, here! <3 <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: ...but that's all in the past, now.

summary: The Marines Watch the Chaos focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.
